title: Senior Investment Banker at Federal Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Federal Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Federal Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Federal Bank:
Federal Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank!
